shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU)— Lackawanna County commissioners voted to table a proposal Wednesday, which would provide a roadmap for county employees when dealing with Immigration and Customs Enforcement and other law enforcement. The proposal stems from nearly two months of debate over the county's proposed 'Protect our Neighbors Ordinance.' For nearly two hours, members of the [...]

shorts.description: OLD FORGE, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU)— A fire broke out at a home in Lackawanna County. Crews were called to Main Street in Old Forge after 3:00 p.m. on Wednesday afternoon for an exterior fire on the second level of the building. The fire chief says they knocked it out quickly before it could spread inside [...]
